revision.comment: Create an error message generator; in the process of writing the doc.
revision.text:
<noinclude> Please note that this page is not broken, it is a template.
</noinclude><big>'''{{red|{{{1|Error. Check the wikitext.}}}}}'''</big><noinclude>
{{documentation, template}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: substitute the {{red}} because none of the benefits of transclusion are useful here
revision.text: Please note that this page is not broken, it is a template. '''{{{1|Error. Check the wikitext.}}}''' {{documentation, template}}

revision.comment: Hijacking this unused template to generate parser function errors
The iferror parser function recognizes only span, div, p and strong, so those are the only tags we allow.
No example text is actually much more intuitive

Protected Template:Error: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: 32,000 transclusions ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
「[[Template:Error]]」の保護レベルを変更しました: [[Wikipedia:保護の方針#半永久的な保護]]「[[Wikipedia:影響が特に大きいテンプレート|影響が特に大きいテンプレート]]」に基づき無期限拡張半保護 ([編集=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限) [移動=拡張承認された利用者と管理者に許可] (無期限))
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects E]]

revision.comment: Hijacking this unused template to generate parser function errors
The iferror parser function recognizes only span, div, p and strong, so those are the only tags we allow.
No example text is actually much more intuitive

Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

Protected Template:Error: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: 32,000 transclusions ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))
1 revision imported: Bot: reimport from enwiki to fix erroneous transclusions [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23208182735|commit triggered pipeline]]

Protected Template:Error: [[WP:High-risk templates|Highly visible template]]: 32,000 transclusions ([Edit=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite) [Move=Allow only template editors and admins] (indefinite))

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Error here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Error for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{#invoke:Error|error|{{{message|{{{1}}}}}}|tag={{{tag|}}}}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude>
